title: Consolidate pack enclosure lower tray into a single high-pressure die-cast node
description: [BEV] 800V Battery Pack: Replace the multi-piece pack enclosure lower tray (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Mercedes G-Class structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.

ideaData.title: Consolidate pack enclosure lower tray into a single high-pressure die-cast node
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace the multi-piece pack enclosure lower tray (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Mercedes G-Class structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.
ideaData.materialGrade: EN AC-46000 (AlSi9Cu3) / Aural-5 (AlSi7MgMn) HPDC / Castasil-37 low-Fe / Recycled secondary Al (low-carbon)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Replaces ~6–15 stamped parts + ~40–120 welds of the pack enclosure lower tray with a single die-cast node; removes weld fixtures and sealing; adds one large press + trim die. Net BOM and joining cost fall; casting scrap is remelted in-house.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: One casting replaces a multi-piece stamped/welded assembly, removing joining tooling.

ideaData.riskNotes: Casting porosity and repairability of the pack enclosure lower tray must meet crash and fatigue targets; large-format die cost is high, so payback needs volume. Alloy choice (self-hardening vs T7) trades ductility for cycle. Off-road shock/torsion durability validated by CAE + rig.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the cross-member / cell-to-pack frame
description: [ALL] 800V Battery Pack: Re-engineer the cross-member / cell-to-pack frame with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Audi Q8 e-tron uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the cross-member / cell-to-pack frame
ideaData.technicalDescription: Re-engineer the cross-member / cell-to-pack frame with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Audi Q8 e-tron uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.
ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Down-gauges the cross-member / cell-to-pack frame and adds cast/formed ribs; higher-grade steel/Al where stress demands; AI-optimised toolpaths cut cycle. No new parts; material spend and mass fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Putting material only on the load path removes mass and cost without adding parts.

ideaData.riskNotes: Stiffness, buckling and fatigue of the cross-member / cell-to-pack frame must hold under off-road load; thinner sections need dent/oil-canning checks. Validated by CAE + rig.

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the module compression plate
description: [ALL] 800V Battery Pack: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the module compression plate with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Lexus LX sustainability roadmaps target this.

ideaData.title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the module compression plate
ideaData.technicalDescription: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the module compression plate with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Lexus LX sustainability roadmaps target this.
ideaData.materialGrade: Low-carbon (green) aluminium / Recycled secondary Al ingot / Recycled copper (secondary cathode) / Bio-attributed / recycled polymer
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Substitutes primary material in the module compression plate with certified recyclate/low-carbon grade; closed-loop remelt of process scrap; swaps solvent coating for water-based/powder. Conversion unchanged; material and carbon cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

ideaData.riskNotes: Recyclate impurity/alloy tramp elements for the module compression plate controlled by spec and sortation; mechanicals re-validated. Coating durability re-tested for off-road stone-chip/corrosion.

title: Delete fasteners on the HV busbar bracket set via clip/weld-bond joining
description: [ALL] 800V Battery Pack: Replace threaded fasteners on the hv busbar bracket set with weld-bonding, self-pierce rivets or moulded snaps, cutting fastener count, torque stations and rework. Cadillac Escalade IQ body/interior lines use adhesive+SPR to lower assembly cost and improve stiffness/NVH.

ideaData.title: Delete fasteners on the HV busbar bracket set via clip/weld-bond joining
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace threaded fasteners on the hv busbar bracket set with weld-bonding, self-pierce rivets or moulded snaps, cutting fastener count, torque stations and rework. Cadillac Escalade IQ body/interior lines use adhesive+SPR to lower assembly cost and improve stiffness/NVH.
ideaData.materialGrade: Structural adhesive (crash-durable) / Self-piercing rivets (SPR) / Integrated snap features
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Removes 6–20 fasteners from the hv busbar bracket set and their driven stations; substitutes adhesive bead + a few SPR/snaps; joint stiffness and sealing improve. Assembly time and fastener inventory fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Adhesive/clip joining removes threaded fasteners, their torque stations and inventory.

ideaData.riskNotes: Adhesive cure, surface prep and serviceability of the hv busbar bracket set must be controlled; SPR access and corrosion at the joint validated. Crash/peel performance verified.

title: Commonise pack lid / top cover variants across the platform
description: [ALL] 800V Battery Pack: Reduce pack lid / top cover variants across trims/wheelbases to a common design (or a base + add-on), pooling volume onto one tool set and one validation. NIO ES8 platform strategy commonises this to cut piece price via volume.

ideaData.title: Commonise pack lid / top cover variants across the platform
ideaData.technicalDescription: Reduce pack lid / top cover variants across trims/wheelbases to a common design (or a base + add-on), pooling volume onto one tool set and one validation. NIO ES8 platform strategy commonises this to cut piece price via volume.
ideaData.materialGrade: Common grade across variants / Single fastener family / Shared seal cross-section
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Collapses 2–4 unique pack lid / top cover part numbers into one (or base+module); one tool set instead of several; validation done once. Piece price falls with pooled volume; inventory/complexity drop.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Pooling volume across variants amortises one tool set and cuts unique part numbers.

ideaData.riskNotes: Common pack lid / top cover must satisfy the worst-case variant load, adding minor mass to lighter trims; packaging must fit all wheelbases. Managed by a base-plus-module split.

title: Switch the gearbox case to near-net forging to cut machining stock
description: [ALL] 800V EDU: Move the gearbox case from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. BMW X7 chassis/driveline parts use this route.

ideaData.title: Switch the gearbox case to near-net forging to cut machining stock
ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the gearbox case from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. BMW X7 chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the gearbox case ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the gearbox case must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

ideaData.title: Switch the EDU housing to near-net forging to cut machining stock
ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the edu housing from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Yangwang U8 chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the edu housing ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the edu housing must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the gearbox case
description: [ALL] 800V EDU: Re-engineer the gearbox case with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Xpeng G9 uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the gearbox case
ideaData.technicalDescription: Re-engineer the gearbox case with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Xpeng G9 uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.
ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Down-gauges the gearbox case and adds cast/formed ribs; higher-grade steel/Al where stress demands; AI-optimised toolpaths cut cycle. No new parts; material spend and mass fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Putting material only on the load path removes mass and cost without adding parts.

ideaData.riskNotes: Stiffness, buckling and fatigue of the gearbox case must hold under off-road load; thinner sections need dent/oil-canning checks. Validated by CAE + rig.

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the motor end-shield
description: [ALL] 800V EDU: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the motor end-shield with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Porsche Cayenne sustainability roadmaps target this.

ideaData.title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the motor end-shield
ideaData.technicalDescription: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the motor end-shield with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Porsche Cayenne sustainability roadmaps target this.
ideaData.materialGrade: Low-carbon (green) aluminium / Recycled secondary Al ingot / Recycled copper (secondary cathode) / Bio-attributed / recycled polymer
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Substitutes primary material in the motor end-shield with certified recyclate/low-carbon grade; closed-loop remelt of process scrap; swaps solvent coating for water-based/powder. Conversion unchanged; material and carbon cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

ideaData.riskNotes: Recyclate impurity/alloy tramp elements for the motor end-shield controlled by spec and sortation; mechanicals re-validated. Coating durability re-tested for off-road stone-chip/corrosion.

title: Commonise oil sump / lube gallery variants across the platform
description: [ALL] 800V EDU: Reduce oil sump / lube gallery variants across trims/wheelbases to a common design (or a base + add-on), pooling volume onto one tool set and one validation. BMW X7 platform strategy commonises this to cut piece price via volume.

ideaData.title: Commonise oil sump / lube gallery variants across the platform
ideaData.technicalDescription: Reduce oil sump / lube gallery variants across trims/wheelbases to a common design (or a base + add-on), pooling volume onto one tool set and one validation. BMW X7 platform strategy commonises this to cut piece price via volume.
ideaData.materialGrade: Common grade across variants / Single fastener family / Shared seal cross-section
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Collapses 2–4 unique oil sump / lube gallery part numbers into one (or base+module); one tool set instead of several; validation done once. Piece price falls with pooled volume; inventory/complexity drop.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Pooling volume across variants amortises one tool set and cuts unique part numbers.

ideaData.riskNotes: Common oil sump / lube gallery must satisfy the worst-case variant load, adding minor mass to lighter trims; packaging must fit all wheelbases. Managed by a base-plus-module split.

title: Consolidate rotor shaft into a single high-pressure die-cast node
description: [BEV] 800V EDU: Replace the multi-piece rotor shaft (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Volvo EX90 structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.

ideaData.title: Consolidate rotor shaft into a single high-pressure die-cast node
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace the multi-piece rotor shaft (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Volvo EX90 structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.
ideaData.materialGrade: EN AC-46000 (AlSi9Cu3) / Aural-5 (AlSi7MgMn) HPDC / Castasil-37 low-Fe / Recycled secondary Al (low-carbon)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Replaces ~6–15 stamped parts + ~40–120 welds of the rotor shaft with a single die-cast node; removes weld fixtures and sealing; adds one large press + trim die. Net BOM and joining cost fall; casting scrap is remelted in-house.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: One casting replaces a multi-piece stamped/welded assembly, removing joining tooling.

ideaData.riskNotes: Casting porosity and repairability of the rotor shaft must meet crash and fatigue targets; large-format die cost is high, so payback needs volume. Alloy choice (self-hardening vs T7) trades ductility for cycle. Off-road shock/torsion durability validated by CAE + rig.

title: Replace the metal DC-link busbar with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
description: [ALL] 800V Inverter: Convert the dc-link busbar from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; Mercedes G-Class uses metal-replacement here.

ideaData.title: Replace the metal DC-link busbar with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
ideaData.technicalDescription: Convert the dc-link busbar from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; Mercedes G-Class uses metal-replacement here.
ideaData.materialGrade: PA6-GF50 (metal-replacement) / PP-LGF40 long-glass / PPA-GF35 high-heat / Recycled PA6-GF (post-industrial)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Integrates 2–5 brackets/clips of the dc-link busbar into one moulding; removes fasteners and their assembly time; a metal insert is overmoulded only where load demands. Tooling is one injection mould.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Moulded-in features replace separate brackets/clips; recycled glass-filled resin lowers cost and CO2e.

ideaData.riskNotes: Creep, thermal expansion and stiffness of the dc-link busbar at temperature must meet load/rattle targets; recycled-content variation controlled by spec. Not for primary crash paths.

title: Delete fasteners on the gate-driver bracket via clip/weld-bond joining
description: [ALL] 800V Inverter: Replace threaded fasteners on the gate-driver bracket with weld-bonding, self-pierce rivets or moulded snaps, cutting fastener count, torque stations and rework. Lexus LX body/interior lines use adhesive+SPR to lower assembly cost and improve stiffness/NVH.

ideaData.title: Delete fasteners on the gate-driver bracket via clip/weld-bond joining
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace threaded fasteners on the gate-driver bracket with weld-bonding, self-pierce rivets or moulded snaps, cutting fastener count, torque stations and rework. Lexus LX body/interior lines use adhesive+SPR to lower assembly cost and improve stiffness/NVH.
ideaData.materialGrade: Structural adhesive (crash-durable) / Self-piercing rivets (SPR) / Integrated snap features
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Removes 6–20 fasteners from the gate-driver bracket and their driven stations; substitutes adhesive bead + a few SPR/snaps; joint stiffness and sealing improve. Assembly time and fastener inventory fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Adhesive/clip joining removes threaded fasteners, their torque stations and inventory.

ideaData.riskNotes: Adhesive cure, surface prep and serviceability of the gate-driver bracket must be controlled; SPR access and corrosion at the joint validated. Crash/peel performance verified.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the A-pillar reinforcement
description: [ALL] BIW (Body-in-White): Re-engineer the a-pillar reinforcement with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Mercedes G-Class uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the A-pillar reinforcement

ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

ideaData.riskNotes: Recyclate impurity/alloy tramp elements for the dash cross-member controlled by spec and sortation; mechanicals re-validated. Coating durability re-tested for off-road stone-chip/corrosion.

title: Consolidate roof bow set into a single high-pressure die-cast node
description: [BEV] BIW (Body-in-White): Replace the multi-piece roof bow set (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Cadillac Escalade IQ structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.

ideaData.title: Consolidate roof bow set into a single high-pressure die-cast node
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace the multi-piece roof bow set (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. costSavingPotential.qualitative: One casting replaces a multi-piece stamped/welded assembly, removing joining tooling.

ideaData.riskNotes: Casting porosity and repairability of the roof bow set must meet crash and fatigue targets; large-format die cost is high, so payback needs volume. Alloy choice (self-hardening vs T7) trades ductility for cycle. Off-road shock/torsion durability validated by CAE + rig.

title: Tailor-weld the front rail / crash can blank to down-gauge low-stress zones
description: [ALL] BIW (Body-in-White): Convert the front rail / crash can to a laser-welded tailored blank so thickness/strength follow the load path — thick/hot-stamped in crash zones, thin in low-stress zones — deleting bolt-on reinforcements. NIO ES8 body engineering uses this to cut mass and weld count.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the shock tower

title: Tailor-weld the strut brace blank to down-gauge low-stress zones
description: [ALL] Body Structure (Crash + Torsion + NVH): Convert the strut brace to a laser-welded tailored blank so thickness/strength follow the load path — thick/hot-stamped in crash zones, thin in low-stress zones — deleting bolt-on reinforcements. Porsche Cayenne body engineering uses this to cut mass and weld count.

ideaData.title: Tailor-weld the strut brace blank to down-gauge low-stress zones
ideaData.technicalDescription: Convert the strut brace to a laser-welded tailored blank so thickness/strength follow the load path — thick/hot-stamped in crash zones, thin in low-stress zones — deleting bolt-on reinforcements. Porsche Cayenne body engineering uses this to cut mass and weld count.
ideaData.materialGrade: CR340LA / CR700Y980T-DP tailored / PHS 22MnB5 + soft-zone laser / Bake-hardening BH260 / 6016-T4 Al for outers
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Replaces a uniform blank + 1–3 reinforcement patches on the strut brace with a single tailor-welded blank; removes patch tooling and their spot welds; adds a laser blank-welding step upstream of press.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: One tailored blank removes separate reinforcement patches and their spot welds.

ideaData.riskNotes: Weld-line placement on the strut brace must avoid forming splits and sit clear of peak strain; corrosion sealing of dissimilar gauges required. Crash performance re-validated; NVH unaffected.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the bumper beam
description: [ALL] Body Structure (Crash + Torsion + NVH): Re-engineer the bumper beam with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. BMW X7 uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the bumper beam
ideaData.technicalDescription: Re-engineer the bumper beam with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. BMW X7 uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.
ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Down-gauges the bumper beam and adds cast/formed ribs; higher-grade steel/Al where stress demands; AI-optimised toolpaths cut cycle. No new parts; material spend and mass fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Putting material only on the load path removes mass and cost without adding parts.

ideaData.riskNotes: Stiffness, buckling and fatigue of the bumper beam must hold under off-road load; thinner sections need dent/oil-canning checks. Validated by CAE + rig.

title: Consolidate rocker / sill beam into a single high-pressure die-cast node
description: [BEV] Body Structure (Crash + Torsion + NVH): Replace the multi-piece rocker / sill beam (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Volvo EX90 structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.

ideaData.title: Consolidate rocker / sill beam into a single high-pressure die-cast node
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace the multi-piece rocker / sill beam (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Volvo EX90 structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.
ideaData.materialGrade: EN AC-46000 (AlSi9Cu3) / Aural-5 (AlSi7MgMn) HPDC / Castasil-37 low-Fe / Recycled secondary Al (low-carbon)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Replaces ~6–15 stamped parts + ~40–120 welds of the rocker / sill beam with a single die-cast node; removes weld fixtures and sealing; adds one large press + trim die. Net BOM and joining cost fall; casting scrap is remelted in-house.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: One casting replaces a multi-piece stamped/welded assembly, removing joining tooling.

ideaData.riskNotes: Casting porosity and repairability of the rocker / sill beam must meet crash and fatigue targets; large-format die cost is high, so payback needs volume. Alloy choice (self-hardening vs T7) trades ductility for cycle. Off-road shock/torsion durability validated by CAE + rig.

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the B-pillar
description: [ALL] Body Structure (Crash + Torsion + NVH): Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the b-pillar with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Land Cruiser 300 sustainability roadmaps target this.

ideaData.title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the B-pillar

ideaData.materialGrade: Low-carbon (green) aluminium / Recycled secondary Al ingot / Recycled copper (secondary cathode) / Bio-attributed / recycled polymer
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Substitutes primary material in the b-pillar with certified recyclate/low-carbon grade; closed-loop remelt of process scrap; swaps solvent coating for water-based/powder. Conversion unchanged; material and carbon cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

ideaData.riskNotes: Recyclate impurity/alloy tramp elements for the b-pillar controlled by spec and sortation; mechanicals re-validated. Coating durability re-tested for off-road stone-chip/corrosion.

title: Replace the metal front fascia / bumper cover with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
description: [ALL] Exterior Systems: Convert the front fascia / bumper cover from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; AITO M9 uses metal-replacement here.

ideaData.title: Replace the metal front fascia / bumper cover with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
ideaData.technicalDescription: Convert the front fascia / bumper cover from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. ideaData.materialGrade: PA6-GF50 (metal-replacement) / PP-LGF40 long-glass / PPA-GF35 high-heat / Recycled PA6-GF (post-industrial)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Integrates 2–5 brackets/clips of the front fascia / bumper cover into one moulding; removes fasteners and their assembly time; a metal insert is overmoulded only where load demands. Tooling is one injection mould.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Moulded-in features replace separate brackets/clips; recycled glass-filled resin lowers cost and CO2e.

ideaData.riskNotes: Creep, thermal expansion and stiffness of the front fascia / bumper cover at temperature must meet load/rattle targets; recycled-content variation controlled by spec. Not for primary crash paths.

title: Delete fasteners on the roof rail via clip/weld-bond joining

title: Switch the air-spring top mount to near-net forging to cut machining stock
description: [ALL] Air Suspension: Move the air-spring top mount from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. NIO ES8 chassis/driveline parts use this route.

ideaData.title: Switch the air-spring top mount to near-net forging to cut machining stock
ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the air-spring top mount from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. NIO ES8 chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the air-spring top mount ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the air-spring top mount must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

ideaData.materialGrade: Common grade across variants / Single fastener family / Shared seal cross-section
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Collapses 2–4 unique compressor mounting frame part numbers into one (or base+module); one tool set instead of several; validation done once. Piece price falls with pooled volume; inventory/complexity drop.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Pooling volume across variants amortises one tool set and cuts unique part numbers.

ideaData.riskNotes: Common compressor mounting frame must satisfy the worst-case variant load, adding minor mass to lighter trims; packaging must fit all wheelbases. Managed by a base-plus-module split.

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the air-line manifold
description: [ALL] Air Suspension: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the air-line manifold with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. AITO M9 sustainability roadmaps target this.

ideaData.title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the air-line manifold
ideaData.technicalDescription: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the air-line manifold with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. AITO M9 sustainability roadmaps target this.
ideaData.materialGrade: Low-carbon (green) aluminium / Recycled secondary Al ingot / Recycled copper (secondary cathode) / Bio-attributed / recycled polymer
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Substitutes primary material in the air-line manifold with certified recyclate/low-carbon grade; closed-loop remelt of process scrap; swaps solvent coating for water-based/powder. Conversion unchanged; material and carbon cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

ideaData.riskNotes: Recyclate impurity/alloy tramp elements for the air-line manifold controlled by spec and sortation; mechanicals re-validated. Coating durability re-tested for off-road stone-chip/corrosion.

title: Switch the ride-height sensor bracket to near-net forging to cut machining stock
description: [ALL] Air Suspension: Move the ride-height sensor bracket from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Hongqi E-HS9 chassis/driveline parts use this route.

ideaData.title: Switch the ride-height sensor bracket to near-net forging to cut machining stock
ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the ride-height sensor bracket from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Hongqi E-HS9 chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the ride-height sensor bracket ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the ride-height sensor bracket must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

title: Replace the metal reservoir tank bracket with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
description: [ALL] Air Suspension: Convert the reservoir tank bracket from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; Rivian R1S uses metal-replacement here.

ideaData.title: Replace the metal reservoir tank bracket with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
ideaData.technicalDescription: Convert the reservoir tank bracket from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; Rivian R1S uses metal-replacement here.
ideaData.materialGrade: PA6-GF50 (metal-replacement) / PP-LGF40 long-glass / PPA-GF35 high-heat / Recycled PA6-GF (post-industrial)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Integrates 2–5 brackets/clips of the reservoir tank bracket into one moulding; removes fasteners and their assembly time; a metal insert is overmoulded only where load demands. Tooling is one injection mould.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Moulded-in features replace separate brackets/clips; recycled glass-filled resin lowers cost and CO2e.

ideaData.riskNotes: Creep, thermal expansion and stiffness of the reservoir tank bracket at temperature must meet load/rattle targets; recycled-content variation controlled by spec. Not for primary crash paths.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the air-spring top mount
description: [ALL] Air Suspension: Re-engineer the air-spring top mount with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Mercedes G-Class uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the air-spring top mount
ideaData.technicalDescription: Re-engineer the air-spring top mount with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Mercedes G-Class uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.
ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Down-gauges the air-spring top mount and adds cast/formed ribs; higher-grade steel/Al where stress demands; AI-optimised toolpaths cut cycle. No new parts; material spend and mass fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Putting material only on the load path removes mass and cost without adding parts.

ideaData.riskNotes: Stiffness, buckling and fatigue of the air-spring top mount must hold under off-road load; thinner sections need dent/oil-canning checks. Validated by CAE + rig.

title: Replace the metal motor mount (EPS) with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
description: [ALL] Steering System: Convert the motor mount (eps) from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. title: Replace the metal TPMS bracket with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
description: [ALL] Tires & Wheels: Convert the tpms bracket from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; Land Cruiser 300 uses metal-replacement here.

ideaData.title: Replace the metal TPMS bracket with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
ideaData.technicalDescription: Convert the tpms bracket from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. ideaData.materialGrade: PA6-GF50 (metal-replacement) / PP-LGF40 long-glass / PPA-GF35 high-heat / Recycled PA6-GF (post-industrial)

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Moulded-in features replace separate brackets/clips; recycled glass-filled resin lowers cost and CO2e.

ideaData.riskNotes: Creep, thermal expansion and stiffness of the tpms bracket at temperature must meet load/rattle targets; recycled-content variation controlled by spec. Not for primary crash paths.

title: Switch the wheel-bolt set to near-net forging to cut machining stock
description: [ALL] Tires & Wheels: Move the wheel-bolt set from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Jeep Grand Cherokee 4xe chassis/driveline parts use this route.

ideaData.title: Switch the wheel-bolt set to near-net forging to cut machining stock
ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the wheel-bolt set from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Jeep Grand Cherokee 4xe chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the wheel-bolt set ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the wheel-bolt set must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the aero wheel cover
description: [ALL] Tires & Wheels: Re-engineer the aero wheel cover with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Li Auto L9 uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the spare-wheel carrier

title: Consolidate axle tube into a single high-pressure die-cast node
description: [BEV] Axles: Replace the multi-piece axle tube (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Cadillac Escalade IQ structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.

ideaData.title: Consolidate axle tube into a single high-pressure die-cast node
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace the multi-piece axle tube (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Cadillac Escalade IQ structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.
ideaData.materialGrade: EN AC-46000 (AlSi9Cu3) / Aural-5 (AlSi7MgMn) HPDC / Castasil-37 low-Fe / Recycled secondary Al (low-carbon)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Replaces ~6–15 stamped parts + ~40–120 welds of the axle tube with a single die-cast node; removes weld fixtures and sealing; adds one large press + trim die. Net BOM and joining cost fall; casting scrap is remelted in-house.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: One casting replaces a multi-piece stamped/welded assembly, removing joining tooling.

ideaData.riskNotes: Casting porosity and repairability of the axle tube must meet crash and fatigue targets; large-format die cost is high, so payback needs volume. Alloy choice (self-hardening vs T7) trades ductility for cycle. Off-road shock/torsion durability validated by CAE + rig.

title: Switch the upper control arm to near-net forging to cut machining stock

description: [ALL] Subframe: Convert the front subframe to a laser-welded tailored blank so thickness/strength follow the load path — thick/hot-stamped in crash zones, thin in low-stress zones — deleting bolt-on reinforcements. Rivian R1S body engineering uses this to cut mass and weld count.

ideaData.riskNotes: Weld-line placement on the front subframe must avoid forming splits and sit clear of peak strain; corrosion sealing of dissimilar gauges required. Crash performance re-validated; NVH unaffected.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the rear subframe / cradle
description: [ALL] Subframe: Re-engineer the rear subframe / cradle with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Mercedes G-Class uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the rear subframe / cradle

ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Down-gauges the rear subframe / cradle and adds cast/formed ribs; higher-grade steel/Al where stress demands; AI-optimised toolpaths cut cycle. No new parts; material spend and mass fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Putting material only on the load path removes mass and cost without adding parts.

ideaData.riskNotes: Stiffness, buckling and fatigue of the rear subframe / cradle must hold under off-road load; thinner sections need dent/oil-canning checks. Validated by CAE + rig.

title: Delete fasteners on the engine/EDU carrier via clip/weld-bond joining
description: [ALL] Subframe: Replace threaded fasteners on the engine/edu carrier with weld-bonding, self-pierce rivets or moulded snaps, cutting fastener count, torque stations and rework. Audi Q8 e-tron body/interior lines use adhesive+SPR to lower assembly cost and improve stiffness/NVH.

ideaData.title: Delete fasteners on the engine/EDU carrier via clip/weld-bond joining
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace threaded fasteners on the engine/edu carrier with weld-bonding, self-pierce rivets or moulded snaps, cutting fastener count, torque stations and rework. Audi Q8 e-tron body/interior lines use adhesive+SPR to lower assembly cost and improve stiffness/NVH.
ideaData.materialGrade: Structural adhesive (crash-durable) / Self-piercing rivets (SPR) / Integrated snap features
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Removes 6–20 fasteners from the engine/edu carrier and their driven stations; substitutes adhesive bead + a few SPR/snaps; joint stiffness and sealing improve. Assembly time and fastener inventory fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Adhesive/clip joining removes threaded fasteners, their torque stations and inventory.

ideaData.riskNotes: Adhesive cure, surface prep and serviceability of the engine/edu carrier must be controlled; SPR access and corrosion at the joint validated. Crash/peel performance verified.

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the subframe bushing sleeve
description: [ALL] Subframe: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the subframe bushing sleeve with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Lexus LX sustainability roadmaps target this.

ideaData.title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the subframe bushing sleeve
ideaData.technicalDescription: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the subframe bushing sleeve with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Lexus LX sustainability roadmaps target this.
ideaData.materialGrade: Low-carbon (green) aluminium / Recycled secondary Al ingot / Recycled copper (secondary cathode) / Bio-attributed / recycled polymer
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Substitutes primary material in the subframe bushing sleeve with certified recyclate/low-carbon grade; closed-loop remelt of process scrap; swaps solvent coating for water-based/powder. Conversion unchanged; material and carbon cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

ideaData.riskNotes: Recyclate impurity/alloy tramp elements for the subframe bushing sleeve controlled by spec and sortation; mechanicals re-validated. Coating durability re-tested for off-road stone-chip/corrosion.

title: Consolidate tie-bar into a single high-pressure die-cast node
description: [BEV] Subframe: Replace the multi-piece tie-bar (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Cadillac Escalade IQ structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.

ideaData.title: Consolidate tie-bar into a single high-pressure die-cast node
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace the multi-piece tie-bar (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Replaces ~6–15 stamped parts + ~40–120 welds of the tie-bar with a single die-cast node; removes weld fixtures and sealing; adds one large press + trim die. Net BOM and joining cost fall; casting scrap is remelted in-house.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: One casting replaces a multi-piece stamped/welded assembly, removing joining tooling.

ideaData.riskNotes: Casting porosity and repairability of the tie-bar must meet crash and fatigue targets; large-format die cost is high, so payback needs volume. Alloy choice (self-hardening vs T7) trades ductility for cycle. Off-road shock/torsion durability validated by CAE + rig.

title: Switch the gearbox housing to near-net forging to cut machining stock
description: [ALL] 2-Speed Automatic Gearbox: Move the gearbox housing from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. BMW X7 chassis/driveline parts use this route.

ideaData.title: Switch the gearbox housing to near-net forging to cut machining stock
ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the gearbox housing from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. BMW X7 chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the gearbox housing ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the gearbox housing must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

title: Commonise output shaft variants across the platform
description: [ALL] 2-Speed Automatic Gearbox: Reduce output shaft variants across trims/wheelbases to a common design (or a base + add-on), pooling volume onto one tool set and one validation. Jeep Grand Cherokee 4xe platform strategy commonises this to cut piece price via volume.

ideaData.title: Commonise output shaft variants across the platform

ideaData.riskNotes: Common output shaft must satisfy the worst-case variant load, adding minor mass to lighter trims; packaging must fit all wheelbases. Managed by a base-plus-module split.

title: Switch the transfer-case housing to near-net forging to cut machining stock

ideaData.title: Switch the transfer-case housing to near-net forging to cut machining stock

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the flange fork

Jeep Grand Cherokee 4xe sustainability roadmaps target this.

ideaData.title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the flange fork
ideaData.technicalDescription: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the flange fork with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. Jeep Grand Cherokee 4xe sustainability roadmaps target this.
ideaData.materialGrade: Low-carbon (green) aluminium / Recycled secondary Al ingot / Recycled copper (secondary cathode) / Bio-attributed / recycled polymer
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Substitutes primary material in the flange fork with certified recyclate/low-carbon grade; closed-loop remelt of process scrap; swaps solvent coating for water-based/powder. Conversion unchanged; material and carbon cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

title: Switch the balance-weight assembly to near-net forging to cut machining stock
description: [ALL] Prop Shafts: Move the balance-weight assembly from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Li Auto L9 chassis/driveline parts use this route.

ideaData.title: Switch the balance-weight assembly to near-net forging to cut machining stock
ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the balance-weight assembly from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Li Auto L9 chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the balance-weight assembly ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the balance-weight assembly must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

title: Replace the metal propeller-shaft tube with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
description: [ALL] Prop Shafts: Convert the propeller-shaft tube from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; Yangwang U8 uses metal-replacement here.

ideaData.title: Replace the metal propeller-shaft tube with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
ideaData.technicalDescription: Convert the propeller-shaft tube from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; Yangwang U8 uses metal-replacement here.
ideaData.materialGrade: PA6-GF50 (metal-replacement) / PP-LGF40 long-glass / PPA-GF35 high-heat / Recycled PA6-GF (post-industrial)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Integrates 2–5 brackets/clips of the propeller-shaft tube into one moulding; removes fasteners and their assembly time; a metal insert is overmoulded only where load demands. Tooling is one injection mould.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Moulded-in features replace separate brackets/clips; recycled glass-filled resin lowers cost and CO2e.

ideaData.riskNotes: Creep, thermal expansion and stiffness of the propeller-shaft tube at temperature must meet load/rattle targets; recycled-content variation controlled by spec. Not for primary crash paths.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the CV/U-joint yoke
description: [ALL] Prop Shafts: Re-engineer the cv/u-joint yoke with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Xpeng G9 uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the CV/U-joint yoke
ideaData.technicalDescription: Re-engineer the cv/u-joint yoke with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Xpeng G9 uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.
ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Down-gauges the cv/u-joint yoke and adds cast/formed ribs; higher-grade steel/Al where stress demands; AI-optimised toolpaths cut cycle. No new parts; material spend and mass fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Putting material only on the load path removes mass and cost without adding parts.

ideaData.riskNotes: Stiffness, buckling and fatigue of the cv/u-joint yoke must hold under off-road load; thinner sections need dent/oil-canning checks. Validated by CAE + rig.

ideaData.technicalDescription: Move the boot-clamp / cover from billet machining to precision near-net forging, cutting buy-to-fly and CNC time; a micro-alloyed air-hardening grade can delete the separate quench-and-temper cycle. Audi Q8 e-tron chassis/driveline parts use this route.
ideaData.materialGrade: 16MnCr5 case-hardening / 42CrMo4 quench & temper / 38MnVS6 micro-alloyed (air-cooled) / Forged 6082-T6 Al
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Cuts machining stock on the boot-clamp / cover ~30–50% and removes a roughing setup; micro-alloyed steel removes the Q&T furnace step. Adds forging dies; net conversion + material cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Near-net forging removes billet stock and a roughing pass; micro-alloyed steel skips a heat-treat.

ideaData.riskNotes: Forging flow-lines and grain direction on the boot-clamp / cover must align with peak stress; die life and preform yield drive payback. Fatigue and impact validated for off-road shock loads.

title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the intermediate-shaft support
description: [ALL] Half Shafts (CV + Plunge): Re-engineer the intermediate-shaft support with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Lexus LX uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.

ideaData.title: Topology-optimise and down-gauge the intermediate-shaft support
ideaData.technicalDescription: Re-engineer the intermediate-shaft support with topology optimisation — ribs/beads on the load path, thinner elsewhere, higher-grade material where it pays — cutting mass and material cost at equal stiffness. Lexus LX uses CAE-led lightweighting on this part.
ideaData.materialGrade: Higher-grade AHSS (down-gauged) / AlSi10Mg (cast, ribbed) / 7075-T6 for peak-load nodes
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Down-gauges the intermediate-shaft support and adds cast/formed ribs; higher-grade steel/Al where stress demands; AI-optimised toolpaths cut cycle. No new parts; material spend and mass fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Putting material only on the load path removes mass and cost without adding parts.

ideaData.riskNotes: Stiffness, buckling and fatigue of the intermediate-shaft support must hold under off-road load; thinner sections need dent/oil-canning checks. Validated by CAE + rig.

title: Commonise CV outer-joint housing variants across the platform
description: [ALL] Half Shafts (CV + Plunge): Reduce cv outer-joint housing variants across trims/wheelbases to a common design (or a base + add-on), pooling volume onto one tool set and one validation. Cadillac Escalade IQ platform strategy commonises this to cut piece price via volume.

ideaData.title: Commonise CV outer-joint housing variants across the platform
ideaData.technicalDescription: Reduce cv outer-joint housing variants across trims/wheelbases to a common design (or a base + add-on), pooling volume onto one tool set and one validation. Cadillac Escalade IQ platform strategy commonises this to cut piece price via volume.
ideaData.materialGrade: Common grade across variants / Single fastener family / Shared seal cross-section
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Collapses 2–4 unique cv outer-joint housing part numbers into one (or base+module); one tool set instead of several; validation done once. Piece price falls with pooled volume; inventory/complexity drop.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Pooling volume across variants amortises one tool set and cuts unique part numbers.

ideaData.riskNotes: Common cv outer-joint housing must satisfy the worst-case variant load, adding minor mass to lighter trims; packaging must fit all wheelbases. Managed by a base-plus-module split.

title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the tripod plunge joint
description: [ALL] Half Shafts (CV + Plunge): Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the tripod plunge joint with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. NIO ES8 sustainability roadmaps target this.

ideaData.title: Adopt low-carbon recycled feedstock for the tripod plunge joint
ideaData.technicalDescription: Qualify recycled/low-carbon feedstock (green Al, secondary copper, recyclate polymer) for the tripod plunge joint with closed-loop scrap return and water-based coatings, cutting embodied CO2e and EU CBAM cost while holding spec. NIO ES8 sustainability roadmaps target this.
ideaData.materialGrade: Low-carbon (green) aluminium / Recycled secondary Al ingot / Recycled copper (secondary cathode) / Bio-attributed / recycled polymer
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Substitutes primary material in the tripod plunge joint with certified recyclate/low-carbon grade; closed-loop remelt of process scrap; swaps solvent coating for water-based/powder. Conversion unchanged; material and carbon cost fall.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Recycled/low-carbon feedstock is cost-neutral-to-cheaper and cuts embodied CO2e and CBAM exposure.

ideaData.riskNotes: Recyclate impurity/alloy tramp elements for the tripod plunge joint controlled by spec and sortation; mechanicals re-validated. Coating durability re-tested for off-road stone-chip/corrosion.

title: Replace the metal shaft bar with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
description: [ALL] Half Shafts (CV + Plunge): Convert the shaft bar from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; AITO M9 uses metal-replacement here.

ideaData.title: Replace the metal shaft bar with a glass/PP hybrid moulding
ideaData.technicalDescription: Convert the shaft bar from stamped/cast metal to a long-glass or GF polyamide moulding with integrated ribs, bosses and clip features, deleting fasteners and secondary brackets. A partial-recycled resin cuts cost and embodied carbon; AITO M9 uses metal-replacement here.
ideaData.materialGrade: PA6-GF50 (metal-replacement) / PP-LGF40 long-glass / PPA-GF35 high-heat / Recycled PA6-GF (post-industrial)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Integrates 2–5 brackets/clips of the shaft bar into one moulding; removes fasteners and their assembly time; a metal insert is overmoulded only where load demands. Tooling is one injection mould.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: Moulded-in features replace separate brackets/clips; recycled glass-filled resin lowers cost and CO2e.

ideaData.riskNotes: Creep, thermal expansion and stiffness of the shaft bar at temperature must meet load/rattle targets; recycled-content variation controlled by spec. Not for primary crash paths.

title: Consolidate ring & pinion set into a single high-pressure die-cast node
description: [BEV] Front & Rear Differentials: Replace the multi-piece ring & pinion set (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Porsche Cayenne structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.

ideaData.title: Consolidate ring & pinion set into a single high-pressure die-cast node
ideaData.technicalDescription: Replace the multi-piece ring & pinion set (stampings + welds/fasteners) with one large structural HPDC node in a low-Fe self-hardening Al alloy, cutting part count, spot welds and fixturing. Benchmarked against Porsche Cayenne structural-casting practice; low-carbon secondary Al lowers embodied CO2e.
ideaData.materialGrade: EN AC-46000 (AlSi9Cu3) / Aural-5 (AlSi7MgMn) HPDC / Castasil-37 low-Fe / Recycled secondary Al (low-carbon)
ideaData.manufacturingImpact: Replaces ~6–15 stamped parts + ~40–120 welds of the ring & pinion set with a single die-cast node; removes weld fixtures and sealing; adds one large press + trim die. Net BOM and joining cost fall; casting scrap is remelted in-house.

costSavingPotential.qualitative: One casting replaces a multi-piece stamped/welded assembly, removing joining tooling.

ideaData.riskNotes: Casting porosity and repairability of the ring & pinion set must meet crash and fatigue targets; large-format die cost is high, so payback needs volume. Alloy choice (self-hardening vs T7) trades ductility for cycle. Off-road shock/torsion durability validated by CAE + rig.
